# API Contracts: E-Commerce Store MVP

**Branch**: `001-e-commerce-store` | **Date**: 2026-04-03
**Generated by**: `/speckit.plan` (Phase 1)

---

## Conventions

- All endpoints return JSON.
- All errors use the shape `{ "error": "<message>" }` with the appropriate
  HTTP status code (Constitution Workflow rule).
- Authentication:
  - **Customer routes**: `customer_session` HttpOnly JWT cookie (set by `POST /api/customers`). Extracted via `jose jwtVerify`.
  - **Admin routes**: HttpOnly JWT cookie `admin_token` (set at `/api/auth/login`).
  - **Cron routes**: `Authorization: Bearer CRON_SECRET` header.
- Timestamps are ISO 8601 strings.

---

## Product Routes

### `GET /api/products`

Returns a paginated list of active products.

**Query params**:
| Param | Type | Notes |
|-------|------|-------|
| `category` | string | Filter by category slug |
| `minPrice` | number | |
| `maxPrice` | number | |
| `page` | number | Default `1` |
| `limit` | number | Default `20` |

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "products": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "فستان صيفي",
      "price": 299.00,
      "oldPrice": 399.00,
      "stock": 12,
      "category": "ملابس",
      "images": [{ "url": "https://res.cloudinary.com/...", "isMain": true }],
      "avgRating": 4.5,
      "reviewCount": 23
    }
  ],
  "total": 84,
  "page": 1,
  "pages": 5
}
```

---

### `GET /api/products/[id]`

Returns a single product with variants, options, and reviews aggregate.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "id": 1,
  "name": "فستان صيفي",
  "description": "...",
  "price": 299.00,
  "oldPrice": 399.00,
  "images": [{ "url": "...", "isMain": true }],
  "variants": [
    {
      "id": 1,
      "name": "المقاس",
      "options": [
        { "id": 10, "value": "S", "stock": 3 },
        { "id": 11, "value": "M", "stock": 0 }
      ]
    }
  ],
  "avgRating": 4.5,
  "reviewCount": 23
}
```

**Response 404**: `{ "error": "Product not found" }`

---

### `POST /api/products` (Admin)

Creates a new product with optional variants. Admin JWT required.

**Auth**: `admin_token` HttpOnly cookie.

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "name": "فستان صيفي",
  "description": "...",
  "price": 299.00,
  "oldPrice": 399.00,
  "stock": 12,
  "category": "ملابس",
  "images": [
    { "url": "https://res.cloudinary.com/...", "isMain": true }
  ],
  "variants": [
    { "name": "المقاس", "options": [{ "value": "S", "stock": 5 }, { "value": "M", "stock": 3 }] }
  ]
}
```

> `variants` and `oldPrice` are optional. Each `options` entry has `value` and `stock` only — **no `price` field** (`VariantOption` has no price column in the DB schema).

**Response 201**: `{ "product": { "id": 1, "name": "فستان صيفي", ... } }`
**Response 401**: `{ "error": "Unauthorized" }`
**Response 422**: `{ "error": "تحقق من بيانات المنتج" }`

---

### `GET /api/products/[id]/reviews`

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "reviews": [
    { "id": 5, "rating": 5, "comment": "ممتاز!", "customer": { "name": "سارة" }, "createdAt": "..." }
  ]
}
```

### `POST /api/products/[id]/reviews`

**Auth required**: `customer_session` HttpOnly cookie (set by `POST /api/customers`). The server verifies the cookie via `jose jwtVerify` and extracts `customerId` from the token payload. **`customerId` must never be sent in the request body** (IDOR risk).

**Request body**:
```json
{ "rating": 5, "comment": "رائع جداً" }
```

**Response 201**: `{ "id": 5, "rating": 5 }`

**Response 422**: `{ "error": "لم تشتر هذا المنتج" }` / `{ "error": "راجعت هذا المنتج من قبل" }`

---

## Customer Routes

### `POST /api/customers`

Upserts a Customer by phone and eagerly creates a `LoyaltyAccount` if absent.
Called at Checkout Step 1.

**Request body**:
```json
{ "name": "أحمد محمد", "phone": "01012345678", "cartSubtotal": 290.00 }
```

> `cartSubtotal` is optional — if absent, `pointsToEarn` returns `0`. CheckoutStep1 should pass the current cart total so the "أتمم طلبك واكسب X نقطة" message is accurate at Step 1.

**Response Headers** (200 & 201):
```
Set-Cookie: customer_session=<signed-jwt>; HttpOnly; SameSite=Strict; Secure; Path=/; Max-Age=2592000
```
> `Secure` is set only in production (`NODE_ENV === "production"`).

**Response 200** (existing customer):
```json
{
  "id": 42,
  "name": "أحمد محمد",
  "phone": "01012345678",
  "currentPoints": 150,
  "pointsToEarn": 29
}
```

**Response 201** (new customer — `LoyaltyAccount` created with 0 points):
```json
{
  "id": 43,
  "name": "سارة علي",
  "phone": "01198765432",
  "currentPoints": 0,
  "pointsToEarn": 29
}
```

> `pointsToEarn` = `Math.floor(cartSubtotal / 10)` estimated from the `cartSubtotal` field in the request body. This enables the "أتمم طلبك واكسب X نقطة" display in CheckoutStep1 before the user proceeds to Step 2.

---

## Order Routes

### `POST /api/orders/preview`

Server-side calculation of delivery fee and loyalty points to earn.
Called when Checkout transitions from Step 1 → Step 2.

**Auth required**: `customer_session` HttpOnly cookie (set by `POST /api/customers`). The server verifies the cookie via `jose jwtVerify` and extracts `customerId` from the token payload. **`customerId` must never be sent in the request body** (IDOR risk).

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "deliveryZoneId": 3,
  "items": [
    { "productId": 1, "variantOptionId": 10, "quantity": 2 }
  ],
  "couponCode": "SAVE10",
  "redeemPoints": 100
}
```

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "subtotal": 598.00,
  "deliveryFee": 50.00,
  "discount": 59.80,
  "total": 588.20,
  "pointsToEarn": 58,
  "currentPoints": 150
}
```

**Response 404**: `{ "error": "منطقة التوصيل غير متاحة" }`
**Response 422**: `{ "error": "الكوبون منتهي الصلاحية" }`

---

### `POST /api/orders`

Creates an order. Re-validates stock server-side.

**Auth required**: `customer_session` HttpOnly cookie (set by `POST /api/customers`). The server verifies the cookie via `jose jwtVerify` and extracts `customerId` from the token payload. **`customerId` must never be sent in the request body** (IDOR risk).

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "addressId": 7,
  "deliveryZoneId": 3,
  "paymentMethod": "CASH",
  "items": [
    { "productId": 1, "variantOptionId": 10, "quantity": 2 }
  ],
  "couponCode": "SAVE10",
  "redeemPoints": 100,
  "source": "INSTAGRAM"
}
```

> **Valid `paymentMethod` values**: `CASH` | `VODAFONE_CASH` | `INSTAPAY` | `CARD`
> **Valid `source` values** (optional): `INSTAGRAM` | `WHATSAPP` | `GOOGLE` | `DIRECT` | `FACEBOOK` | `TIKTOK`

**Response 201**:
```json
{
  "orderId": 88,
  "orderNumber": "ORD-2026-0088",
  "total": 488.20,
  "pointsToEarn": 48,
  "whatsapp": {
    "storeWhatsApp": "2010XXXXXXXX",
    "customerName": "أحمد محمد",
    "customerPhone": "01012345678",
    "items": [
      { "name": "فستان صيفي", "variant": "M", "quantity": 2, "price": 299.00 }
    ],
    "subtotal": 598.00,
    "deliveryFee": 50.00,
    "discount": 59.80,
    "paymentMethod": "CASH",
    "address": "12 شارع التحرير، المعادي"
  }
}
```

> **`whatsapp` object**: Contains all fields needed by `lib/whatsapp.ts` to build the pre-filled WhatsApp message URL (`wa.me/{storeWhatsApp}?text=...`). `storeWhatsApp` is read from `Admin.whatsappNumber` in the DB (not an env var). If `Admin.whatsappNumber` is `null`, the `whatsapp` key is `null` and the client hides the WhatsApp button. The client calls `buildWhatsAppOrderUrl()` with this data and redirects the customer to WhatsApp immediately after order creation.

> **`pointsToEarn` is an estimate** (= `Math.floor(subtotal / 10)`). Points are **not awarded here** — they are committed to `LoyaltyAccount` only when the order status transitions to `DELIVERED` (see `PATCH /api/orders/[id]`).

**Response 409**: `{ "error": "المنتج نفد المخزون" }`

---

### `GET /api/orders/[id]`

Returns order details for the tracking page.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "id": 88,
  "orderNumber": "ORD-2026-0088",
  "status": "PREPARING",
  "items": [
    { "name": "فستان صيفي", "variant": "M", "quantity": 2, "price": 299.00 }
  ],
  "subtotal": 598.00,
  "deliveryFee": 50.00,
  "discount": 59.80,
  "total": 488.20,
  "paymentMethod": "CASH",
  "customerName": "أحمد محمد",
  "customerPhone": "01012345678",
  "address": "12 شارع التحرير، المعادي",
  "pointsToEarn": 48,
  "createdAt": "..."
}
```

> The response includes all fields needed by `buildWhatsAppOrderUrl()` (T015b) so the order tracking page can render the "أرسل عبر واتساب 📱" button at any time.

### `PATCH /api/orders/[id]`

Admin only. Updates order status and triggers side-effects:
- Any status change → creates `ORDER_STATUS` Notification for the customer.
- `DELIVERED` → awards loyalty points (`LoyaltyTransaction` created) + `ORDER_DELIVERED` Notification.
- `CANCELLED` → reverses any earned/redeemed points for this order.
- `paymentStatus` (`PENDING` | `PAID`) is a separate DB field; it is **not** updated by this endpoint — it is managed externally (e.g., payment webhook or manual admin DB update). Not exposed in any API response to avoid leaking payment state unintentionally.

**Request body**: `{ "status": "ON_WAY" }`

**Response 200**: `{ "id": 88, "status": "ON_WAY" }`

---

## Cart Routes

### `POST /api/cart/abandon`

Upserts an `AbandonedCart` by phone.

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "phone": "01012345678",
  "items": [{ "productId": 1, "variantOptionId": 10, "quantity": 1 }]
}
```

**Response 200**: `{ "ok": true }`

---

## Notification Routes

### `GET /api/notifications`

Returns last 20 notifications for the authenticated principal.
Auth: customer phone cookie OR admin JWT cookie.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "notifications": [
    { "id": 5, "title": "تم تأكيد طلبك", "message": "...", "type": "ORDER_CONFIRMED", "isRead": false, "createdAt": "..." }
  ],
  "unreadCount": 3
}
```

### `PATCH /api/notifications/read`

Marks all unread notifications as read for the authenticated principal.

**Response 200**: `{ "updated": 3 }`

---

## Auth Routes (Admin)

### `POST /api/auth/login`

Bootstrap Admin from env vars on first run; verify credentials on subsequent runs.

**Request body**: `{ "phone": "01012345678", "password": "secret" }`

**Response 200**: Sets `admin_token` HttpOnly cookie. Returns `{ "ok": true }`.

**Response 401**: `{ "error": "بيانات غير صحيحة" }`

### `PATCH /api/auth/admin`

Admin only. Updates phone and/or password (credentials only).

**Request body**: `{ "phone": "...", "password": "..." }`

> All fields are optional. This endpoint handles **credentials only** — store settings (logo, WhatsApp, socials, policies) are managed via `PATCH /api/settings`.

**Response 200**: Re-issues `admin_token` cookie. Returns `{ "ok": true }`.

---

### `GET /api/settings`

Public (no auth). Returns all non-sensitive store settings needed by the storefront.

**Response 200**:
```json
{
  "storeName": "المتجر",
  "logo": "https://res.cloudinary.com/.../logo.png",
  "whatsappNumber": "2010XXXXXXXX",
  "instagram": "https://instagram.com/store",
  "facebook": "https://facebook.com/store",
  "tiktok": "https://tiktok.com/@store",
  "returnPolicy": "### سياسة الاسترجاع\n\nيمكن استرجاع المنتج خلال 14 يوم..."
}
```

> Fields return `null` if not configured by the admin. The storefront uses this to:
> - Show/hide WhatsApp button (if `whatsappNumber` is `null`)
> - Render social media icons in footer (hide if `null`)
> - Render `/policies/returns` page content from `returnPolicy`
> - Display store name in header, metadata, receipts

### `PATCH /api/settings`

Admin only. Updates store settings (logo, WhatsApp, social links, policies).

**Request body**:
```json
{
  "storeName": "متجر الأناقة",
  "logo": "https://res.cloudinary.com/.../logo.png",
  "whatsappNumber": "2010XXXXXXXX",
  "instagram": "https://instagram.com/store",
  "facebook": "https://facebook.com/store",
  "tiktok": "https://tiktok.com/@store",
  "returnPolicy": "### سياسة الاسترجاع\n..."
}
```

> All fields are optional. Set any field to `null` to clear it. `whatsappNumber` must be international format digits only (no `+` prefix).

**Response 200**: `{ "ok": true }`

---

## Cron Routes

### `GET /api/cron/abandoned-cart`

**Auth**: `Authorization: Bearer <CRON_SECRET>` (Vercel injects automatically).

Finds carts with `reminded = false` and `updatedAt < now - 1h`.
Creates `ABANDONED_CART` Notification per cart. Sets `reminded = true`.

**Response 200**: `{ "processed": 4 }`

**Response 401**: `{ "error": "Unauthorised" }` (missing/invalid CRON_SECRET)

---

## Coupon Routes

### `POST /api/coupons/validate`

**Request body**: `{ "code": "SAVE10", "subtotal": 598.00 }`

**Response 200**: `{ "discount": 59.80, "type": "percentage", "value": 10 }`

**Response 422**: `{ "error": "الكوبون غير صالح" }` / `{ "error": "الطلب أقل من الحد الأدنى" }`
